page.purpose: Institute mission, values, vision, and authentic power foundation
Biography, authority, and public credibility for Gary Zukav
Biography, spiritual partnership, books, and reverent legacy framing for Linda Francis

notes.note: This sub-site is isolated so homepage/mobile work on the root index can continue without collisions.
All three pages follow the current SOTSI look and feel rather than the live site's older visual treatment.
Final production linking for books, podcast, resources, and memorial content remains open.
